commands_executed: awk 'BEGIN { FS="[[:space:]]+"; OFS=" " } { if (substr($0,1,1) == "#" && $2 == "/boot/efi") { sub(/^[[:space:]]*#+[[:space:]]*/, "", $0); } if (NF >= 4 && $2 == "/boot/efi") { n = split($4, a, ","); found = 0; for (i=1; i<=n; i++) { gsub(/^[[:space:]]+|[[:space:]]+$/, "", a[i]); if (a[i] == "nosuid") found = 1; } if (!found) { if (n > 0) $4 = $4 ",nosuid"; else $4 = "nosuid"; } } print; }' /etc/fstab > /etc/fstab.tmp

/dev/mapper/rlm-swap    none                    swap    defaults        0 0
tmpfs /dev/shm tmpfs defaults 0 0
